name: Lin's Super Terrific Smoked Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat smoker to 225°F (107°C).
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Place pork chops into a zip-top bag and pour the marinade over them, ensuring each chop is coated.
4. Seal the bag and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or up to overnight for best flavor.
5. Remove pork chops from the bag and discard any remaining marinade.
6. Place pork chops on the smoker rack and cook until internal temperature reaches 145°F (63°C), about 1 hour.
7. Turn off the smoker and let the pork chops rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
